zh.Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可阿申維爾索普
zh.Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England: 英國肯特易斯爾 本 謝坡
zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana Northwood於大約1342年出生在英國肯特時，她的父親Sir John de Northwode15歲，母親Joan Hart6歲。她於1379年11月與John Digges結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1414年1月3日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可阿申維爾索普享年73歲。

zh-hans.Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可阿申維爾索普
zh-hans.Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England: 英国肯特易斯爾 本 謝坡
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana Northwood于大约1342年出生在英国肯特时，她的父亲Sir John de Northwode15岁，母亲Joan Hart6岁。她于1379年11月与John Digges结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1414年1月3日在英国英格兰諾福爾可阿申維爾索普享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Northwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2  English: perhaps also a variant of   Northard  .

variants.name: Norwood
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called Northwood or Norwood, such as Northwood in Essex, Middlesex, Isle of Wight, Norwood in Middlesex and Surrey, or Northwood Farm in Okehampton and Northwood Farm in Morchard Bishop, both in Devon. The placenames mean ‘north or northern wood’, from Old English north ‘north, northern’ + wudu ‘wood’ or Middle English north + wode. Compare Norrod .

variants.name: Northard
meanings: 1 English: locative name from Middle English northward ‘northward’, for someone who dwells to the north.

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana Northwood was born about 1342, in Kent, England, her father, Sir John de Northwode, was 15 and her mother, Joan Hart, was 6. She married John Digges in November 1379. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 3 January 1414, in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana Northwood est née environ 1342, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Northwode, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Joan Hart, avait 6 ans. Elle a épousé John Digges en novembre 1379. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 janvier 1414, à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana Northwood um 1342 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Northwode 15 und ihre Mutter Joan Hart 6. Sie hat im November 1379 John Digges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Januar 1414 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana Northwood è nata il circa 1342 nel Kent, England, sua padre, Sir John de Northwode, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Joan Hart, aveva 6 anni. Lei sposato John Digges nel novembre 1379. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 3 gennaio 1414, nel Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana Northwoodが約1342年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Sir John de Northwodeは15歳，母Joan Hartは6歳であった。1379年11月にJohn Diggesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1414年1月3日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana Northwood(이)가 대략 1342년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Northwode(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Hart(은)는 6세였다. 그녀는 1379년 11월 John Digges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1414년 1월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 애슈웰소에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England: Ashwellthorpe, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana Northwood nasceu aproximadamente 1342, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Northwode, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Joan Hart, tinha 6 anos. Ela casou-se com John Digges em novembro de 1379. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de janeiro de 1414, em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana Northwood родилась около 1342 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Northwode было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Hart, 6. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Digges ноябрь 1379 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 3 января 1414 г. в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliana Northwood nació aproximadamente 1342, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Northwode, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Joan Hart, tenía 6 años. Se casó con John Digges en noviembre de 1379. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 3 de enero de 1414, en Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años.
